raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch fazzija to Jardann bij gahjutchi/ tad
uhſ Barsillaju: Tew buhs ar mannin eet/ es uſturretchu tew
darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Barsillajus fazzija us to Kehniku: Zik garſch tad
buhs wehl mannas Dſihwibas Laiks/ ka man ar to Kehniku bij
us Jeruſalemi ect?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es eſmu ſchodeen aſtox-
definitis Gaddus wezz/ ka war-
retu es paſiht/ kas labs jeb tauns
irr? jeb ka warretu taws Kalps
jmekeht/ ko es chnu un dserru?
ka warretu es wehl uſklausiht
us teem Dſeedatajein un Dſee-
datajahm? un kapehz buhtu taws
Kalps mannim Kungam tam
Kehnikam wairs par Nastu?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Taws Kalps ees maſke-
niht ar to Kehniku pahr to Jar-
danu / kapehz gribbetu tas Keh-
niſch ar tahdu leeln Atinaſfa-
ſchann to atmakfaht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid / luhdsans / taws
Kalps atgreeschahs/ ka es manná
Pilsfahta mirſtu / pee manna
Tehwa un pee mannas Mahtes
Kappa. Un reds/ ſche irr taws
Kalps Kimeains/ lai tas arman-
nu Kungu to Kehniku pahreet /
un darri tam/ kas tew labbi
patihk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 38,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas Kehniſch:
Kimeamam buhs ar man lihds
eet / un es darriſchu wiannam/
kas tew labbi patihk/ irwiſſu/ fo
"
    },
    {
      "n": 39,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad wiſſi Landis pahr
gabje arri tas Kehniſch pahri/
un tas Kehniſch ſkubpſtija Bar-
sillaju/un twehtiia to/ un wiſſch
atgreeſehs atkaſ us faru Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 40,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch gabje
prohjam us Gilgalit/ un Kiune-
ams gabje ar to lihdsi/ un wiſſi
Landis no Juhda bijto Kehniku
pahrwedduſcht/ irr weena Puſfe
to Israëta Lauschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 41,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un raugi/ wiſſi Israëka
Wiḣri nahze pee ta Kehnika / un
fazzija us to Kehniku : Kapehz
irr muhsu Brahti/ tee Wiḣri no
Juhda/ tew nosagguſcht / un to
Kehniku ar winna Nammin pahr
to Jardanu wedduſcht/ lihds ar
wiſſeem Dah wida Wiḣreeni?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad athildeja wiſſi Wiḣ-
rt no Juhda teem Israëta Wiḣ-
reem: Tapehz ka tas Kehniſch
mums tuwu Raddu irr / un ka-
pehz irr jums par to Duſinas?
eſſam tad mehs no ta Kehnika
ehst dabbuſcht/ jeb irr wiſſch
mums Dahwanas dewis?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Israëta Wiḣri at-
bildeja teem Wiḣreen no Juhda/
un fazzija: Mums irr definitis
Daltas pee ta Kehnika un arrı
pee Dah wida/ mums irr wairaſ
ne ka jums. Kapehz tad eſſi tu
mann tahdá Negohdá turrejs /
ka muhsu Wahrdś ne irr tas pir-
majs biis/ pee muhsu Kehnika
atpakkat Weſchanas? Bet to
Wiḣru
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
